features.name: class_inheritance_with_post_randomize_override
features.description: Code should include a child class that extends a parent class and overrides post_randomize(), calling super.post_randomize().

features.name: class_inheritance_with_pre_randomize_override
features.description: Code should include a child class that extends a parent class and overrides pre_randomize(), calling super.pre_randomize().

features.name: virtual_class_with_randomize_subclass
features.description: Code should include a virtual class (uvm_object pattern) with a concrete subclass that overrides post_randomize and calls super.post_randomize().
